last_fix.description: 4-rule batch escalation: ranging, btc_trend_long_counter, high_vol, eth_sell_bb. All met graduation criteria.

new_findings_this_run.detail: LLM engine probes afternoon BOOST (+5pts, gate=20%) via tod_afternoon_edge_v1, while feedback engine probes AFTERNOON_SESSION_BLOCK (-8pts, gate=20%). These are mutually contradictory probes for the same 12:00-18:00 UTC window. The two systems are running A/B tests with opposing hypotheses simultaneously. Cannot auto-resolve — requires live data to determine which direction is correct.
new_findings_this_run.evidence: LLM: tod_afternoon_edge_v1 boost+5 gate=20% (evidence_ratio=0.64, n=27). Feedback: AFTERNOON_SESSION_BLOCK -8pts gate=20%. Same time window, opposite signs.
new_findings_this_run.action: HUMAN_REVIEW — post-restart: track afternoon signal WR separately for boost-cohort vs block-cohort. If WR<0.45 over n>=20, disable the boost rule and escalate the block rule.

new_findings_this_run.detail: LLM engine gate distribution milestone: 3 disabled / 5 probe(20%) / 7 graduated(50%) / 8 deployed(100%). First run with 7 rules at gate=50%.
